Title: Guest Checkout - Happy Path
Preconditions: Store allows anonymous users (anonymousUsersAllowed: true), products available in catalog
Steps:
[NAV] Open {{FRONT_URL}} in incognito/private window (not logged in)
[NAV] Navigate to product page for {{TEST_SKU}}
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout'
[WAIT] Wait for guest checkout email step
[ACT] Fill 'Email' field with guest email address
[ACT] Fill shipping address (First Name, Last Name, Street, City, State, ZIP, Country)
[ACT] select shipping method
[ACT] Fill payment details in payment form
[ACT] click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for confirmation page
[ASSERT] Verify confirmation page with order number displayed
Assertions:
[NAV] Guest reaches checkout without being redirected to login
[DOM] Email field appears on guest checkout
[DOM] Shipping form accepts all fields
[DOM] Shipping methods listed
[DOM] Payment form functional
[DOM] Confirmation page shows order number
[STATE] Cart cleared after order placement
[STATE] No account creation required to complete purchase
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] No errors during guest checkout flow
[NETWORK] No unauthorized 401 responses blocking checkout
[ADMIN] Guest order appears in {{ADMIN_URL}}/orders
Failure_Signals: Guest redirected to login page instead of proceeding as guest; confirmation page not reached after payment

Title: Guest Checkout - New Address Entry
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout (anonymousUsersAllowed: true), no saved addresses for guest
Steps:
[NAV] Proceed to checkout as guest (not logged in)
[ASSERT] Verify no pre-populated or saved address shown
[ACT] Fill 'Street' field with valid street address
[ACT] Fill 'City', 'State', 'ZIP', 'Country' with valid values
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[WAIT] Wait for shipping method step
[ASSERT] Verify entered address shown in shipping summary
[ASSERT] Verify shipping methods calculate based on entered address
Assertions:
[DOM] No saved address shown for guest user
[DOM] All address fields accept manual input
[STATE] Validation passes on valid address
[STATE] Address carried through to shipping method and order summary steps
[DOM] Shipping methods listed after address entry
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST address for guest session returns valid response
[CONSOLE] No errors on address submission
Failure_Signals: Saved addresses from previous sessions shown for anonymous user; shipping methods not loading after address entry

Title: Guest Checkout - Track Order
Preconditions: Guest order successfully placed, order number and guest email noted
Steps:
[NAV] Note order number from confirmation page
[NAV] Note email used during guest checkout
[NAV] Navigate to order tracking page (e.g. {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders or dedicated tracking URL)
[ACT] Fill guest email field with order email
[ACT] Fill order number field with order number
[ACT] click 'Track Order' or 'Submit'
[WAIT] Wait for tracking results
[ASSERT] Verify correct order details displayed
[ASSERT] Verify status clearly shown
[ACT] Enter incorrect email with correct order number
[ASSERT] Verify error shown for mismatch
Assertions:
[DOM] Tracking form accessible without login
[DOM] Email and order number fields present
[STATE] Correct combination returns order details and status
[STATE] Incorrect email + order number returns error (not order data)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /orders/track?email=...&order=... returns correct order
[CONSOLE] No unhandled errors on tracking page
Failure_Signals: Tracking page requires login; correct guest credentials return no order; wrong credentials return order data (security issue)

Title: Guest Checkout - Prompt Registration After Purchase
Preconditions: Guest order just placed, user on confirmation page
Steps:
[NAV] Complete guest checkout and land on order confirmation page
[ASSERT] Verify 'Create Account' prompt or banner present
[ASSERT] Verify prompt references linking order to new account
[ACT] click 'Create Account' from confirmation page
[WAIT] Wait for registration form
[ASSERT] Verify registration form pre-fills guest email
[ACT] Complete registration with valid password
[ACT] submit registration
[WAIT] Wait for account creation confirmation
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ASSERT] Verify guest order appears in new account order history
Assertions:
[DOM] Create Account prompt visible on confirmation page
[DOM] Prompt text references order linking
[DOM] Registration form pre-fills guest email
[STATE] After registration guest order appears in account history
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /account/register links guest order to new account
[CONSOLE] No errors during account creation flow
Failure_Signals: Create Account prompt absent from confirmation; guest order missing from account after registration

Title: Guest Checkout - With Coupon Code
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout (anonymousUsersAllowed: true), valid coupon code exists in system
Steps:
[NAV] Proceed to checkout as guest with items in cart
[ACT] Enter guest email address
[ACT] Fill shipping address
[ACT] select shipping method
[ASSERT] Locate coupon code input field
[ACT] Enter valid coupon code in coupon field
[ACT] click 'Apply'
[WAIT] Wait for discount to apply
[ASSERT] Verify discount line item appears in order summary
[ASSERT] Verify total reflects discounted amount
[ACT] click 'Place Order'
[ASSERT] Verify confirmation page shows discounted total
Assertions:
[DOM] Coupon input field accessible to guest users
[STATE] Valid coupon accepted with success confirmation
[DOM] Discount shown as separate line in order summary
[MATH] Total = subtotal + shipping + tax - coupon discount
[DOM] Confirmation page shows coupon discount line item
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation response errors[] is empty
[API] Order payload contains applied coupon/promotion
[CONSOLE] No errors on coupon application
Failure_Signals: Coupon field not shown for guests; coupon accepted but discount not reflected in total; discount disappears at confirmation

Title: Guest Checkout - Field Validation
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout email and address entry step
Steps:
[NAV] Proceed to checkout as guest (not logged in)
[ACT] click 'Continue' without entering email
[ASSERT] Verify 'Email is required' or equivalent error shown
[ACT] Enter invalid email format 'notanemail'
[ASSERT] Verify 'Enter a valid email address' error shown
[ACT] Enter valid email address
[ACT] Leave required address fields (Street, City, ZIP) empty
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[ASSERT] Verify inline error per empty required field
[ACT] Fix each field with valid data
[ASSERT] Verify error clears as each field is corrected
[ACT] click 'Continue' with all valid data
[ASSERT] Verify form advances to next step
Assertions:
[DOM] Email required error on empty submit
[DOM] Email format error on invalid format
[DOM] Per-field inline errors for required address fields
[STATE] Form does not advance with validation errors
[STATE] Individual errors clear when field corrected
[NAV] Form advances after all errors resolved
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS exceptions during validation interactions
[API] No API calls made while client-side validation active
Failure_Signals: Form advances with invalid email; no per-field errors shown; all errors clear simultaneously instead of per field

Title: Guest Checkout - Register After Purchase and Order Linked
Preconditions: Guest order placed, on confirmation page with Create Account option
Steps:
[NAV] Complete guest checkout successfully
[ASSERT] Verify 'Create Account' prompt on confirmation page
[ACT] click 'Create Account' or 'Register' from confirmation
[ACT] Complete registration form with guest email and new password
[ACT] submit registration form
[WAIT] Wait for account confirmation
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ASSERT] Verify guest order visible in order history
[ASSERT] Verify order details match original guest order
Assertions:
[DOM] Create Account prompt on confirmation
[STATE] Registration completes without error
[STATE] Guest order linked to new account and visible in order history
[DOM] Order details (items, totals, addresses) match original guest order
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /account/register response indicates order linking
[CONSOLE] No errors during registration and order linking
[ADMIN] Account created in {{ADMIN_URL}} with order linked
Failure_Signals: Guest order absent from account history after registration; registration fails when using guest email
Cleanup: Delete test account via {{ADMIN_URL}} if created

Title: Guest Checkout - Disabled When Anonymous Users Not Allowed
Preconditions: Store configured with anonymousUsersAllowed: false, products available
Steps:
[NAV] Open {{FRONT_URL}} in incognito/private window (not logged in)
[NAV] Navigate to product page for {{TEST_SKU}}
[ACT] click 'Add to Cart'
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] click 'Checkout' or 'Proceed to Checkout'
[ASSERT] Verify user redirected to sign-in or login page
[ASSERT] Verify prompt to log in or register
[ASSERT] Verify cart contents preserved after redirect
Assertions:
[NAV] Guest redirected to sign-in/sign-up page (not checkout)
[DOM] Login or register prompt displayed
[STATE] Cart contents preserved for authenticated session
[STATE] No guest checkout option shown when disabled
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Store settings endpoint reflects anonymousUsersAllowed=false
[CONSOLE] No unexpected errors on redirect
Failure_Signals: Guest can access checkout without login when anonymousUsersAllowed=false; cart lost on redirect to login

Title: Checkout Validation - Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout, on email entry step
Steps:
[NAV] Proceed to checkout as guest (not logged in)
[ACT] Enter invalid email 'user@' in email field
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[ASSERT] Verify error 'Enter a valid email address' or equivalent
[ACT] Enter 'notanemail' (no @ symbol)
[ASSERT] Verify format validation error still shown
[ACT] Enter 'user@domain' (no TLD)
[ASSERT] Verify error shown
[ACT] Enter valid email 'test@example.com'
[ASSERT] Verify error clears
[ACT] click 'Continue'
[ASSERT] Verify form advances to address step
Assertions:
[DOM] Email format error rendered for each invalid pattern
[STATE] Form does not advance with invalid email
[STATE] Error clears when valid email entered
[DOM] Error message references email validity
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS exceptions during email validation
[API] No API call made with invalid email
Failure_Signals: Email format not validated; form accepts 'notanemail' without error

Title: Guest Checkout - No Saved Addresses Available
Preconditions: Guest checkout enabled; anonymous user at checkout step
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart as anonymous user with items
[ACT] proceed to checkout
[ASSERT] verify no saved address dropdown or selector is shown
[ASSERT] verify empty address form is displayed for manual entry
[ACT] fill all required address fields manually
[ASSERT] verify address accepted and shipping methods appear
Assertions:
[DOM] no saved address selector visible for guest
[DOM] blank address form rendered
[STATE] manual address entry is the only option for guest
Failure_Signals: saved addresses from another user shown; address selector appears for guest; error on address form render

Title: Guest Checkout - Order Confirmation Without Order History Link
Preconditions: Guest checkout completed; on order confirmation page
Steps:
[NAV] complete guest checkout flow (add item > checkout > payment)
[WAIT] wait for order confirmation page
[ASSERT] verify order number is displayed on confirmation page
[ASSERT] verify NO link to order history or account dashboard is shown
[ASSERT] verify email confirmation message displayed (order details sent to email)
Assertions:
[DOM] order number visible on confirmation page
[DOM] no 'View Order History' or 'My Account' link present for guest
[DOM] email confirmation notice displayed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on confirmation page
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: order history link shown to guest (would 404 or error); no order number displayed; confirmation page is blank

Title: Guest Checkout - Same Email as Existing Account
Preconditions: Guest checkout enabled; email matches an existing registered account
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as anonymous user
[ACT] add product to cart and proceed to checkout
[ACT] enter {{USER_EMAIL}} (existing account email) in guest email field
[ACT] complete shipping address and payment
[ASSERT] verify system displays an informational message about existing account
[ASSERT] verify no unhandled error or crash
Assertions:
[STATE] checkout does not crash on email conflict
[DOM] informational message about existing account displayed
[DOM] no generic/500 error page
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS errors
[NETWORK] no 5xx errors on email validation
Failure_Signals: unhandled error on email conflict; checkout crashes; order created under wrong account; silent failure
